education.description: Learned QA fundamentals including test design and defect management, gained hands-on experience in console, mobile, and web testing, and applied advanced techniques like load, regression, and usability testing. Developed knowledge in release management and collaboration, and completed a full-cycle QA project from planning to execution.

experience.title: QA Intern
experience.description: Performed functional and regression testing on Payday 3, wrote detailed bug reports in Jira, retested fixes, and conducted crossplay and backend validation. Followed structured test plans alongside exploratory testing and used community feedback to guide priorities. Strengthened organization, communication, and independent task management in a live AAA environment.
highlights: Collaborated with dev teams on regression testing
